prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-GATACCMFM-VIST-PNK-2PK Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): McNett Existing Title: Tactical 2-PACK Camo Form Protective Camouflage Wrap (Pink) Description: Camo Form Wrap stretches and sticks to itself without leaving behind any residue and conforms to any shape for a custom fit. When it gets dirty or wet, simply remove, wash, let dry and reapply. The heavy duty fabric not only protects and conceals tactical gear, but it also adds grip, insulates hands from hot or cold surfaces, and quiets clanking objects. This 8 ft. roll of camo form wrap can stretch to twice it's length at 16 ft. It's self clinging material leaves behind no residue and will not fall off.

This is the perfect accessory to all your hunting and outdoor sporting gear. Make sure to cover up your precious equipment and camouflage yourself in the field with this 2pack Camouflage Adhesive Pink Wrap. Search Terms: Camouflage Conceal Hunting Wrap Gun Cover Features: - Heavy Duty Fabric Is Washable and Reusable - Quiet Clanking Objects - Adds Grip - Insulates Hands From Hot or Cold Surfaces - Conforms to Any Shape === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: McNett 2-Pack Pink Camo Form Protective Wrap

openai.item_name: McNett 2-Pk Pink Camo Form Protective Camouflage Wrap

anthropic.title_differentiation: 8Ft Stretches To 16Ft, Washable And Reusable, Self-Clinging, Heavy Duty, Adds Grip, Insulates, Quiets Gear

openai.title_differentiation: Washable And Reusable, Self-Clinging No Residue, Adds Grip, Insulates Hands, Quiets Clanking, Conforms Any Shape
